ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date_of_travel" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company operating the ride-hailing service */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the ride took place */,
  "km_travelled" REAL /* Distance travelled in kilometers */,
  "price_charged" REAL /* Price charged to the customer */,
  "cost_of_trip" REAL /* Cost of the trip */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "payment_mode" TEXT /* Mode of payment (e.g., Card, Cash) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver for the trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Customer rating for the trip (1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback for the trip */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for trip cancellation (if applicable) */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trip was cancelled */,
  "surge_multiplier" REAL /* Surge pricing multiplier for the trip */,
  "estimated_time_of_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival for the trip */,
  "actual_time_of_arrival" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival for the trip */,
  "estimated_time_of_completion" TEXT /* Estimated time of completion for the trip */,
  "actual_time_of_completion" TEXT /* Actual time of completion for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_mode FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the company */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the company registered with the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "users" INTEGER /* Number of ride-hailing service users in the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Monthly income of the customer in USD */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the customer (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last trip */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_modes" (
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment mode */,
  "payment_mode" TEXT /* Mode of payment (e.g., Card, Cash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment mode */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment mode (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_years" (
  "travel_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel year */,
  "travel_year" INTEGER /* Year during which travel took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_months" (
  "travel_month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel month */,
  "travel_month" INTEGER /* Month during which travel took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "users" INTEGER /* Number of ride-hailing service users in the city */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups in the city */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income levels in the city */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels in the city */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts before successful access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance travelled */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price charged */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of trip */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance travelled */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price charged */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of trips */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance travelled */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance travelled */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price charged */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price charged */,
  "max_cost" REAL /* Maximum cost of a trip */,
  "min_cost" REAL /* Minimum cost of a trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_statistics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "average_trips" REAL /* Average number of trips taken */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance travelled */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price paid */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the customer */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance travelled by the customer */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price paid by the customer */,
  "total_loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Total loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance travelled by the customer */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance travelled by the customer */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price paid by the customer */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price paid by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_statistics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
